name: Beech Faux Slats Patio Accent Table Black - Threshold™
description:
Bring a touch of elegance and functionality to your outdoor space with this Beech Faux Slats Patio Accent Table from Threshold™. The patio accent table features a square shape with a spacious faux-slatted top for resting your drinks, books and other items. The rust- and UV-resistant all-weather construction promotes lasting outdoor use no matter the season, and the matte black color will pair well with any existing patio decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
